first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the justification, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing and ordering (e.g., "MCP tooling" vs. "MCP frameworks", reordering of concerns) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new concepts or change the core assessment of the candidate's fit for the role. There is no evidence that the change in university influenced the outcome.
